items.title: The Quarterly Roadmap Update
items.content: After analyzing the usage data from our top 50 clients, we are pivoting our Q4 focus to enhance the mobile experience and improve search performance.

items.title: Migrating Legacy Modules to React 18
items.content: The frontend architecture team has officially started the migration of the 'Knowledge Base' portlets to React 18. This will significantly improve performance.

items.title: New Family Support: Kindergarten Benefit is Live!
items.content: We are thrilled to announce a new addition to our benefits package! Starting today, employees can apply for the 'Knowledge Base' portlets to React 18.
